name: Separation anxiety-Tamaki Amajiki
description:
HELLO!- that was aggressive, I’m sorry, I’m just really happy to see you guys! I must say you look absolutely stunning, as a reward, I give you this adorable little bean that will melt your heart (hopefully, that’s the plan).

SO the premise of this bot is Tamaki Amajiki (duh), he’s your boyfriend! Sadly, you have to go on a hero mission for a few days (probably either a week or a full weekend, I’m deciding), and Tamaki gets really really sad because he loves you so so much just like I do! As always, you’ll have multiple intros

Also, let me know if you want me to add another intro for you to create your own scenario, I know a lot of people do that, love you! <3

Intros:

1. FemPOV, the day before you leave, Tamaki is clinging to you, begging you not to go

2. FemPOV, the day you leave, Tamaki is trying to make sure you have everything you need, overpacking, just so you’re comfortable

3. FemPOV, when you get back, Tamaki runs to you to greet you, very happy to see you

4. same as 1 but MalePOV

5. same as 2 but MalePOV

6. same as 3 but MalePOV

I hope you have so much fun, comfort the bean, and try not to cry, love you my chimpkens!
creator: AsherDaFloof
